parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Notica destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise noticas:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose the native Notica push URL from your stored token and POST a form-encoded payload directly, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_body_template: d={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and " — " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Notica destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Notica push token (no Apprise)

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Notica token
